$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE support

max_file_size_for_line_search.description: Skip line number detection for files larger than this (bytes). Default: 2MB

content_preview_length.description: Max characters for content preview in Write/Edit logs

task_description_length.description: Max characters for task description in .tasks_* logs. 0 = no truncation (full text)

skill_args_length.description: Max characters for Skill tool args preview. 0 = name only, 100 = default preview

datetime.description: Timestamp format: full (datetime), date (date only), none

pwd.description: Include working directory in log entries

routing.description: Control which log channels receive entries

channels.description: Define available log channels. Key is channel name. v0.3.7 #45 fix: when overriding a SHIPPED channel (shell/sesslog/tools/...), `file_prefix` is OPTIONAL — omit it and the shipped value plus all unmentioned options are preserved (per-key merge). When DECLARING a NEW channel, `file_prefix` is REQUIRED (it's the sentinel that distinguishes 'declare new' from 'override existing').

file_prefix.description: Filename prefix (e.g., '.shell_', '.mcp_'). Required when declaring a new channel; optional when overriding a shipped channel.

options.description: v0.3.7+ per-channel formatting/behavior options. All fields optional; defaults preserve current behavior.

verbosity.description: Effective max chars per entry. String preset ('full', 'preview', 'name-only'); hint dict with reserved keys ({'max_chars': N}, {'max_lines': N}); per-role map ({'agent:user': 'preview', 'PowerShell': {'max_chars': 50}}). Reserved keys cannot be role names.

formatter.description: Named formatter from registry. v0.3.7 ships: 'default' (hybrid-json {ROLE: ...}), 'chat' (chat-log style; convo channel default), 'task-only' (tasks channel default), 'jsonl' (stub for v0.4.x). Phase 2+3 wires dispatch.

newline_policy.description: Sub-option of 'default' formatter only. 'escape' = literal \n in output (current; grep-friendly); 'render' = actual newlines (multi-line). Other formatters have intrinsic newline behavior. Per-role map shape also accepted.

role_labels.description: Per-channel override of global ROLE_LABELS dict. Maps role identifier (e.g., 'edit') to display label (e.g., 'EDT'). Use to condense labels in dense channels or rename for custom workflows.

suppress_markers.description: Opt out of session-marker broadcast (used by v0.3.7 #39 marker-broadcast work).

subtype_split.description: v0.3.7-pre per-channel subtype split control (supersedes the removed routing.subtype_routing category-wide toggle). true = split for any subtype the channel's traffic generates; list[str] = split only for listed subtype names (e.g., ['help', 'senior-engineer']); false (default) = no split. Single-level only: `.agents-help_*` never chains to `.agents-help-bash_*`. Default true only on the `agents` channel.

category_routes.description: Map tool categories to channels. Use '_default' for fallback. Use 'unknown' for uncategorized tools (those without a specific TOOL_CATEGORIES entry). The 'tools' channel captures AI activity (tools, skills, tasks, shell) for investigation views without prose.

additionalProperties.description: Array of channel names to write to

tool_overrides.description: Override routing for specific tools (by exact tool name)

action_only.description: Action-only mode settings (log tool name only, not params)

max_stderr_lines.description: Max lines of stderr to capture

task_logging.description: Task tool logging settings (for future sync integration)
